creator: sanpei@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also had this issue on Google Could Platform/Compute Engine.

I solved below steps
1. remove /usr/local/etc/instance_configs.cfg
2. execute /usr/local/bin/google_instance_setup-2.7 command (and created instance_configs.cfg
3. /usr/local/etc/rc.d/google_accounts_daemon restart

Thank you for your information.
